home.about-me: I'm a <highlight>Senior Frontend Engineer</highlight> with over 6 years of experience building and maintaining production-grade web applications.<break></break> I focus on turning complex requirements into clear, scalable interfaces, with strong attention to performance, maintainability, and long-term code health. I care not only about how systems look on day one, but how easily they can be understood, modified, and extended over time.<break></break> I've worked in remote-first teams, collaborating closely with product managers, designers, and engineers. I value clear communication, documented decisions, and pragmatic trade-offs over both over-engineering and under-engineering. Beyond implementation, I contribute to architecture discussions, help define meaningful testing strategies, and support teams through refactors and incremental improvements.<break></break> I believe good frontend work is invisible when done right and I aim to build systems that teams can trust and evolve with confidence.

about-me.quote: 'Crafting code and stories, a snapshot of my digital odyssey' - ChatGPT

cards.years-experience: With <highlight>{time} of experience</highlight> in software development, I specialize in creating user-friendly web interfaces with a focus on <highlight>scalability</highlight>.
cards.attention-details: My attention to detail ensures a seamless user experience, while my code is designed for <highlight> easy maintenance, testability, and scalability</highlight>.
cards.worldwide: Embracing a <highlight>remote-first mindset</highlight>, I had the opportunity to <highlight>collaborate worldwide</highlight> creating exceptional digital solutions.

working-with-me.title: Working with me
working-with-me.quote: I care deeply about how I show up in a team, not just through the code I write, but through communication, collaboration, and responsibility.<break></break>The feedback below reflects how I've worked with product managers, designers, and engineers in real, day-to-day situations.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.quote: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your visions.<break></break>Feel free to reach out through any of the platforms below, and let's start a conversation!
